name: reachnative-car
description: Ride-hail monorepo: npm start = Expo from /mobile (use npm start; global `expo` CLI is not required). npm run backend for API.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix mobile
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,mobile -c blue,green "npm run backend" "npm run mobile"
scripts.dev:lan: concurrently -n backend,proxy,mobile -c blue,green,magenta "npm run backend" "npm run api-proxy" "npm run mobile"
